description.ko: 침식, 광물 퇴적물, 그리고 지질학적 경관의 가공되지 않은 구조적 아름다움 사이의 복잡한 상호작용에 초점을 맞춘 지구 표면의 시각적 탐구입니다.
description.en: A visual study of the planet's diverse surface, focusing on the complex interplay of erosion, mineral deposits, and the raw structural beauty of the geological landscape.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro photography of earth's crust, intricate tectonic textures, dried cracked riverbeds with golden mineral veins, aerial view of diverse geological formations, volcanic basalt patterns mixed with sedimentary layers, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, organic earthy color palette, detailed soil grains and rock erosion.
